prompt: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

inputData.question: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average reported workload hours for each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average reported workload hours for each course?"},"startedAt":1771855403607,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average reported workload hours for each course. The workload_hours column is in the course_evaluations table, which links to enrollments via enrollment_id. Enrollments link to course_sections via course_section_id, and course_sections link to courses via course_id. I need to join these tables and group by course, calculating the average of workload_hours (which is nullable, so AVG will ignore nulls). I'll order by course code for deterministic output.","sql":"SELECT 
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  AVG(ce.workload_hours) AS average_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code","assumptions":["Workload hours are reported in the course_evaluations table","Only evaluations with non-null workload_hours values are included in the average","Results are grouped by unique course (identified by course code and name)"]},"endedAt":1771855431021},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

visualization.title: Average Reported Workload Hours by Course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  AVG(ce.workload_hours) AS average_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code

visualization.title: Average Reported Workload Hours by Course

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  AVG(ce.workload_hours) AS average_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code
